5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (example/conn.js). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (example/conn.js, example/socket.io.js, ...). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5050.issue: [E5050] process.exit() used in  (src/main.ts). This is incompatible with compact mode as it terminates the entire host process. Remove process.exit() or set common.compact to false at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.socketio/blob/master/io-package.json).

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (example/socket-client/tools.d.ts, example/socket-client/tools.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.
